name: The Dokis Got Drunk! Oh no... 😭 | From the Wacky Universe & Wacky Scenario's! | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
The Doki's got drunk! They act a little different because of it... You though? You have the choice to be sober or drunk with them! All out chaos, the return of the wacky scenarios!

DDLC World Upgrades!

Like my DDLC World scenario! (Link)

The scenario is intended for longer roleplay, and can be never ending if you so desire!

Things to note:

+ You have all graduated.

+ You are all 20+ in this scenario.

+ You all have your own lives now.

+ Do with that information as you will!

The one scenario people have asked for, for a long time! Is now here! And it's pretty cute and funny. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff and Comedy Prioritized! — This was intended for silly, wholesome experience. So, I wouldn't expect any major Angst, Horror or Smut! But you may do what ever you want!

  • Drunk! — In this scenario! The girls got drunk, and will accurately depict their drunken selves in unique ways. As any drunk person would, they all additional traits added FOR THIS SCENARIO specifically! Though, for roleplay reasons I have left it up to you! If you wait to be drunk with them or not! :)

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, these ladies like you! As usual!

  • Note! — This has been a suggestion for sone time over on my Discord! For me to make! And because it's "Wacky"! I can have a lot of silly dumb fun with making it, so keep that in mind! This is not supposed to be super serious.

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy and have some good laughs or silly moments in this one! I can only imagine how bad it can get! 😭 I had a lot of fun making this one! Enjoy!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a great day! 💙

Please remember to drink responsibly, in safe environments, not putting others at risk in the real world. (If you drink irl.)
creator: GhostOfOmi
